column1: Bot Behavior Weights — Positional Multipliers by Phase, Override Thresholds & Hard Constraints

Weights multiply a player's base value score. 1.0 = neutral, >1.0 = favored, <1.0 = suppressed. Phases: Early = first 27% (R1-4 in 15R), Mid = 27-60% (R5-9), Late = 60%+ (R10+). valueOverride = rounds of ADP value needed to break archetype preference.

column23: Heavily suppresses RB early. WR favored. Relaxes after 55%.
Spikes RB in R1 only (1.8x), then suppresses. WR picks up mid.
RB heavily favored early AND mid. WR suppressed early.
All weights neutral — pure value. Lower override threshold needed.
Heavily suppresses RB+WR in R1-2. QB/TE boosted early.
Spikes QB in early phase. Suppresses after first QB taken.
Strong QB suppression until late phase.
QB effectively blocked until final phase.
Spikes TE early, suppresses after taken.
Late phase slightly favors high-variance player type tag.
Late phase avoids boom-or-bust. Slight penalty on high-variance types.
Late phase boosts RB (handcuff type). Requires player-type tag.

column1: HARD CONSTRAINTS (apply to all archetypes regardless of weights): DST never before round determined by pct_to_round(0.67, totalRounds). K only in final round. Never exceed startable + 2 bench of any position. Never leave required starter slot empty by pct_to_round(0.67, totalRounds).
